completed_tasks.name: Resolution/dispute UI + LLM buttons + settings page
Unified market status colors + dispute button
Active positions include non-closed + dispute always visible
Hide Place Bet when not open + multichoice resolution error
Tier 2.5 review window: accept/dispute voting + migration 011
Your Position hides withdraw/refund when not open; Community Vote opinion-based buttons; backend removes yes/no constraint, vote_weights dict, upsert cast_vote, user_vote in DisputeRecord
Replace 5-min Celery poll with per-market ETA task; per-dispute close_dispute_at_deadline callback; notify_resolution_due; dashboard URL tab; NotificationBell resolution_due
Community vote: active button green+bold+border, tally ordered with 0-weight entries, weight format (x.x), dispute close callback from _escalate_overdue_proposer
Vote weight bug fix: compare body.vote vs user position (not position vs resolution.outcome); all active buttons green+bold
Numeric community vote: own vote+weight + bar chart; YES button red when voted NO; user_weight in DisputeRecord API + types

remaining_tasks.name: Socket event wiring + Navbar /settings link
remaining_tasks.description: Wire bet:resolved, resolution:proposed, resolution:review_updated, dispute:opened, dispute:voted (update vote_weights live), dispute:closed on market detail page. Add /settings link to Navbar.

human_actions_pending.action: Browser-verify community vote UX: opinion buttons per market type, bar chart for numeric, (x.x) weight format, green active button, YES→red when voted NO, Your Position hides withdraw when market not open
human_actions_pending.context: Multiple sessions of UI changes. Optionally test vote weight logic by checking 0.5/2.0/1.0 weights appear correctly based on position vs vote.

decisions.decision: Tier 2.5 review window: >10% dispute threshold triggers Tier 3
Community vote is opinion-based (what YOU think is correct), not agree/disagree with proposer
decisions.rationale: Redesign: multichoice/numeric can't be binary agree/disagree

decisions.decision: Vote weight: compare user VOTE vs user BET POSITION (match→0.5, differ→2.0, no position→1.0)
decisions.rationale: Bug fix — old code compared position vs resolution.outcome, wrong for users betting against proposed outcome

decisions.decision: vote_weights: Record<string, float> replaces yes_weight/no_weight throughout
decisions.rationale: Supports arbitrary outcome values for multichoice/numeric

decisions.decision: Dispute votes are upsert (changeable) — click another button to change
decisions.rationale: User-requested: voters should be able to revise opinion

decisions.decision: 5-min Celery beat poll → per-market ETA task (resolve_market_at_deadline) at deadline+5min
decisions.rationale: Precise callback; proposer notified via bell when Tier 1 fails

decisions.decision: Per-dispute close_dispute_at_deadline ETA task at closes_at (48h from escalation)
decisions.rationale: Precise callback; 15-min poll retained as safety net

decisions.decision: Numeric community vote: own vote+weight display + bar chart of all votes
decisions.rationale: Continuous range can't list all possibilities; bar chart shows distribution

decisions.decision: Binary: YES button red when user voted NO (active=green, rejected=red)
decisions.rationale: Visual clarity of voted vs rejected option

next_action: Optional: browser verify community vote. Then /clear and /gsd:execute-phase 05 for plan 05-06 (socket wiring + navbar /settings link)
context_notes: Two sessions of hotfixes on community vote UI + scheduling architecture. Tier 3 dispute is now a proper opinion poll with market-type-aware inputs, correct weight logic, bar chart for numeric. Scheduling replaced polling with exact-time ETA callbacks. 05-06 is the last plan — small (6 socket listeners + navbar link). After 05-06, run /gsd:verify-work.
